reasoning: To tackle your lactate clearance limiter, this workout focuses on over-unders that are crucial for improving your fatigue resistance and underdeveloped aerobic base. Your last ride showed decent aerobic effort, but more intense work will prepare you for sustained power during the Alpine Loop, especially the demanding Sundance to Cascade Springs segment.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4x sessions of 8 minutes alternating 2 minutes at 218W and 2 minutes at 248W, 3 minutes rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
